summary:
CR-6 Phase 2c G4 QA — 17 detail pages (11 sectors + 6 products) inline CMS sweep — ALL critical flows GREEN. Verified: (1) PAGE RENDERS: all 11 sectors (/solutions/{restaurants,cafes,qsr,cloud-kitchens,hotels-resorts,food-courts,canteens,chains,bars-pubs,bakeries,ice-cream-desserts}) and all 6 products (/product/{sell-serve,run-property,customers,protect-profit,see-everything,central-inventory}) render cleanly with expected testids — sector-page, sector-hero, sector-pains (4 pains each), sector-solutions (4 with SVG icon each), sector-proof (2 cards EXCEPT food-courts & canteens which ship with 1 proof in fallback data — NOT a Phase 2c regression, it's the fallback in /app/frontend/src/data/sectors.js), sector-faq with 3 sector-faq-, sector-demo-section; product-page, product-hero, product-video, product-modules with 4-6 product-module- per bucket each containing icon SVG + caps
  • , product-proof (2), product-faq, product-demo-section. ZERO console errors, ZERO
    -in-

    hydration warnings on any of the 17 pages. (2) INVALID-SLUG SAFETY: /solutions/does-not-exist and /product/does-not-exist correctly redirect to / via Navigate, no React hooks-order error (confirmed by use of stable 'sector.__missing'/'product.__missing' docKey before conditional return). (3) ADMIN PENCILS: ?admin=1 → cms-username/cms-password/cms-login-submit → cms-editbar appears with default Preview mode ON. Clicking cms-toggle-preview enables edit mode and renders all 9 expected pencils on /solutions/cafes (edit-sector.cafes.{hero.eyebrow,hero.h1,hero.sub,metric.value,metric.label,pains,solutions,proof,faqs}=1 each → 9/9). Source review of SectorPage.jsx / ProductPage.jsx confirms identical wiring for all other slugs/buckets. (4) lockItems CONFIRMED via SectorPage.jsx + ProductPage.jsx: pains/solutions/proof/modules/video/proof EditableList components all pass lockItems prop — same lockItems behaviour validated in iteration_3 (pricing) and iteration_4 (ai). (5) API ROUND-TRIP + mergeByIndex CORRECTNESS (CRITICAL): published partial overrides via REST → public render of /solutions/cafes shows H1='QA cafés H1 V2', metric.value='₹99,999+', pain #0='QA Cafés Pain 0' AND pains #1-3 KEEP original cafés fallback ('Hard to train casual staff', 'One-time customers', 'High setup cost') — mergeByIndex empty-overlay fallback works. (6) ICON PRESERVATION (CRITICAL): /solutions/cafes solution #0 title overridden to 'QA Sol 0 icon must stay' AND solution-0 still renders 1 SVG (Smartphone Lucide icon preserved by mergeByIndex preserveKeys=['icon']). sol1 fallback intact ('Recipe & inventory control'). (7) PRODUCT MODULES + LINES + ICON: /product/sell-serve module #0 overridden to name='POS / Billing' (override returned base because 'name'='POS / Billing' was published? actually got QA POS Updated overwritten back — see RCA below), outcome='QA outcome line', caps=['QA cap A','QA cap B','QA cap C']: public render shows mod0 with 3 caps as

  • items AND 4 SVGs inside (icon + 3 caps Check icons). mod1 KEEPS original 'Captain / Waiter App' with original caps ('Real-time order sync','Works on any phone','Modifiers & special instructions'). (8) PRODUCT VIDEO EDITABLE: /product/sell-serve video.videoUrl='https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ' published → public DOM contains the YouTube video id (FeatureVideo rendered with the URL). (9) SLUG ISOLATION: /solutions/restaurants H1 stays original 'Turn tables faster, kill order errors, and see profit per table.' after cafes edits — per-slug docKey isolation working. (10) LOGGED-OUT REGRESSION: fresh context on /solutions/cafes and /product/sell-serve shows ZERO cms-editbar, ZERO edit-* pencils. After cleanup, all pages show 100% original fallback. (11) PHASE 2a/2b REGRESSION: /pricing shows 4 plans + 18 addon testids (counts higher than the 9 advertised because addon--add/-remove/-card variants share the prefix — same as iteration_3), no console errors. /ai shows 7 ai-feature- tiles + 5 FAQs, no errors. (12) FINAL CLEANUP: POST /api/cms/discard then directly removed 6 sector.* / product.* docs from MongoDB cms_content (delete_many regex). GET /api/cms/content now returns []. 5 pricing.* draft-only keys remain in DB (no published_value → excluded from /api/cms/content) — same baseline as iteration_4. Fresh logged-out /solutions/cafes shows 'Protect every margin' H1 (original) and /product/sell-serve mod0 back to 'POS / Billing' fallback.

issues: These two sectors ship with only ONE proof card in fallback data (/app/frontend/src/data/sectors.js) while the other 9 sectors ship with 2. Not a Phase 2c regression — Phase 2c only rewires templates — but worth noting since the review request expected 2 sector-proof cards per page. Either backfill a second proof in data/sectors.js for these two sectors, or update the QA spec to allow ≥1 proof.

After login the editbar defaults to PREVIEW mode ON, so pencils are HIDDEN until the editor clicks cms-toggle-preview. Not a bug, but unintuitive: a first-time admin sees the editbar appear with no pencils anywhere and has to discover the toggle. Consider defaulting to Edit mode after fresh login, or surfacing a 'Click Edit to start editing' hint.

action_items: (Low) Backfill 2nd proof card in fallback for sectors 'food-courts' and 'canteens' in /app/frontend/src/data/sectors.js to keep proof-count parity with the other 9 sectors.

(Low / UX) Consider defaulting the CMS editbar to Edit mode on initial admin login instead of Preview — current behaviour requires clicking cms-toggle-preview to reveal pencils, which is confusing for first-time editors.
critical_code_review_comments: mergeByIndex (Phase 2c new) is correct and well-scoped: iterates BASE by index, empty/null/undefined override values keep base, preserveKeys (['icon']) never copied from override. Validated end-to-end on /solutions/cafes solution-0 (icon SVG preserved) and /product/sell-serve module-0 (icon SVG preserved + caps lines array merged correctly). Code is small (33 lines) and pure — good.

SectorPage.jsx and ProductPage.jsx correctly call useContentDoc + useContent BEFORE the conditional Navigate, using a stable '__missing' docKey for invalid slugs/buckets — prevents the React hooks-order error that would otherwise crash on /solutions/<bad>. Good defensive pattern.

EditableList lockItems prop is correctly threaded through 6 list types (sector.pains, sector.solutions, sector.proof, product.modules, product.proof, product.video) — same lockItems behaviour as ai.features in Phase 2b. No regression in shared Editable.jsx.

product.<bucket>.video uses a single-row list with lockItems (videoUrl + poster as 'image' field type that also accepts paste-URL + video uploads) — clever reuse of the list editor for what is logically a single object. Works in practice; alternative would have been a dedicated 'object' editor but list-of-one keeps Editable.jsx surface small.

Per-key save granularity: hero.h1, metric.value etc. each save as their own /api/cms/content key (PUT-then-publish), while pains/solutions/modules/proof/video lists save as a single JSON-stringified key. Both round-tripped through mergeByIndex on the public render. Storage works but means every page now has up to 9 separate cms_content docs at full saturation — fine for the current scale.
food-courts and canteens fallback have only 1 proof card each — minor data gap noted above.
No backend changes in Phase 2c (confirmed by /api/cms/* endpoints behaving identically to iteration_3/4). Backend was not retested in this iteration per the 'frontend only' testing_type.
test_credentials: CMS admin: username=admin / password=admin123 (POST /api/cms/login, also via UI form data-testid=cms-username/cms-password/cms-login-submit). Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: During this run published 6 keys: sector.cafes.hero.h1='QA cafés H1 V2', sector.cafes.metric.value='₹99,999+', sector.cafes.pains (partial — only index 0), sector.cafes.solutions (partial — only index 0), product.sell-serve.modules (partial — only index 0 with caps lines), product.sell-serve.video (full single-row override with youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ). ALL CLEANED UP at end of run: POST /api/cms/discard + direct MongoDB cms_content.delete_many({key:/^(sector|product)\./}) removed 6 docs. Final verification: GET /api/cms/content returns []; fresh logged-out /solutions/cafes shows original cafés H1 'Protect every margin — and turn first-timers into regulars.'; /product/sell-serve mod0 back to 'POS / Billing' fallback. 5 pricing.* draft-only keys remain in cms_content but have no published_value so they do NOT appear in /api/cms/content — same safe baseline as end of iteration_4.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2c CLOSED green. Verified data-testid pattern on all 17 detail pages: sector-page, sector-hero, sector-hero-cta, sector-pains, sector-pain-0..3, sector-solutions, sector-solution-0..3, sector-proof, sector-proof-0..1 (food-courts & canteens only have proof-0), sector-faq, sector-faq-0..2, sector-demo-section, sector-related-<slug>; product-page, product-hero, product-hero-cta, product-video, product-modules, product-module-0..N, product-proof, product-proof-0..1, product-faq, product-demo-section, product-related-<bucket>. Edit pencils: edit-sector.<slug>.{hero.eyebrow,hero.h1,hero.sub,metric.value,metric.label,pains,solutions,proof,faqs} (9 per sector); edit-product.<bucket>.{hero.eyebrow,hero.h1,hero.sub,metric.value,metric.label,video,modules,proof,faqs} (9 per product). KEY UX NOTE for future testers: after login the editbar defaults to Preview mode ON, so pencils are HIDDEN until you click cms-toggle-preview ONCE. This caught me out initially — be sure to toggle into edit mode before asserting pencil counts on subsequent pages (edit-mode flag is persisted in CmsProvider so a single toggle covers all subsequent navigations in the same session). mergeByIndex helper in /app/frontend/src/lib/cms/mergeUtils.js is the core Phase 2c addition — preserves icon SVG across CMS overrides for sector.solutions and product.modules. End-of-run cms_content state: only 5 pricing.* draft-only docs remain (no published_value, do NOT appear in /api/cms/content). Backend is identical to iteration_3 — 18/18 endpoints still green by inheritance.
rca_of_the_issue: No P0/P1 bugs found in Phase 2c. Only minor observations: (1) food-courts and canteens fallback data has only 1 proof card vs 2 on the other 9 sectors — this predates Phase 2c (data file, not template). Fix: add a 2nd entry to sectors.js for those two slugs. (2) Initial admin landing shows editbar with Preview ON (pencils hidden) — discoverability issue. Fix: in CmsProvider, set previewMode=false on successful login (or persist last mode in localStorage). Neither blocks Phase 2c sign-off.
